title: Standalone evidence attach with three-source provenance authorization
summary: Exercises ACP Checkpoint E1 (evidence provenance + standalone attach). Drives a single task through three distinct authorized standalone evidence attaches — by a role-bound actor, by the supervisor with explicit attachEvidence capability, and by an actor with a persisted participant run on the task — verifies that EvidenceRecord provenance fields (actor, role, runId, participantRunId, supervisorRunId) round-trip correctly, and confirms idempotency replay. Includes negative cases for unauthorized actors and idempotency conflicts.

task.goal: Collect three field-note evidence records demonstrating provenance for each authorized actor type.

steps.summary: Supervisor creates the workflow task pinned to evidence_provenance_demo@1, binds collector=larry.

args.goal: Collect three field-note evidence records demonstrating provenance for each authorized actor type.

steps.summary: Collector (role-bound actor larry) attaches a field_note via standalone evidence attach API. Provenance must record actor={agent:larry}, role=collector, runId=undefined, participantRunId=undefined, supervisorRunId=undefined.

evidence.summary: Field note attached by the role-bound collector via POST /v1/tasks/:id/evidence

steps.summary: Supervisor (with attachEvidence capability) attaches a supervisor_note via standalone evidence attach API. Provenance must record actor={agent:rex}, supervisorRunId=<active supervisor run>, role=undefined.

evidence.summary: Supervisor compliance note attached via supervisor authority

steps.summary: Supervisor launches a participant run for the collector role. The participant run will produce a participant_artifact in the next step. This step exists to set up provenance source (c).

Collector attaches a participant_artifact via standalone evidence attach API, supplying runId from step 04. Provenance must record actor={agent:larry}, role=collector, runId=<participant runId from 04>, participantRunId=<same>.

evidence.summary: Artifact produced by the collector during their participant run

steps.summary: Replay step 02 with the SAME idempotency key and SAME payload — must return the original evidence record with the same evidenceId (no duplicate).

evidence.summary: Field note attached by the role-bound collector via POST /v1/tasks/:id/evidence

steps.summary: Collector closes the task as success — all three evidence kinds are now present.

negativeChecks.name: unauthorized-actor-cannot-attach
negativeChecks.summary: Attempt to attach a field_note as actor={agent:intruder} (not bound to any role, not the supervisor, no participant run on this task). Expect rejection code authority_not_granted (or capability_not_granted).

negativeChecks.name: supervisor-without-capability-cannot-attach
negativeChecks.summary: On a fresh task where the supervisor binding lacks attachEvidence:true, attempt step 03. Expect rejection code capability_not_granted.

negativeChecks.name: idempotency-conflict-on-different-payload
negativeChecks.summary: Replay step 02 with the SAME idempotency key but a DIFFERENT payload (e.g., change ref). Expect rejection code idempotency_conflict.

negativeChecks.name: evidence-kind-not-in-workflow-rejected
negativeChecks.summary: Attempt to attach an evidence record with kind=undefined_kind not declared in workflow.evidenceKinds. Expect rejection code invalid_evidence (or workflow_definition_mismatch).

negativeChecks.name: participant-run-mismatch-rejected
negativeChecks.summary: Attempt to attach evidence supplying a runId that exists on a DIFFERENT task. Expect rejection code authority_not_granted (or invalid_evidence).
